title: Meteorites 3D
description:
Meteorites 3d

Fly through space in a 3D space while asteroids are hurdling towards you in this empty void

Arcade NostalgiaFly around and destroy as many meteorites and saucers as you can before losing all your lives!

The smaller the target the larger the points!

Combo Meter

Build up your combo meter by destroying targets in quick succession (try and get on the leaderboard for highest combo and score!)

Life UP

Every 50,000 points you'll get a life up! (max of 5) so if you lose some don't fret!

W :: Fly

Left Click :: Fire

Old bouncy footage (:

Realise a classic arcade game in full 3D

Enjoy the Game Created By A Single Developer,Remember In Space No One Can Hear You Scream...
description_short: Experience the retro arcade shooter inspired game Meteorite 3D built for modern 3D rendering, being a spiritual successor to the space games of old
